nasb.text: He who digs a pit will fall into it, And he who rolls a stone, it will come back on him.

esv.text: Whoever digs a pit will fall into it, and a stone will come back on him who starts it rolling.

cnv.text: 挖掘陷坑的，自己必掉在其中； 輥石頭的，石頭必輥回自己身上。

ccb.text: 挖陷阱的，必自陷其中； 滚石头的，必自伤己身。

csbs.text: 挖陷坑的，自己必掉在其中； 滚石头的，石头必返回己身。
